h1cd5449cg40b5g4023gbc12g9869e16e06a8: *The foul stench of slaughter turns suddenly sweet through the rat's nose.*
h25c1d1d9g4768g481bg9d9cga9771ef6287d: *Blood-smell. Life-smell. Not like the great hollow below, which smells only of death.*
h050cffbcg6026g4f88g91b4ga9b33f7af943: *You feel the rat twitching on the edge of panic - something waits in the great hollow below.*
